System Architecture

100% 
flowchart LR
    subgraph Clients[1. Clients]
        A[Web]
        B[Mobile]
        C[API]
    end

    subgraph Gateway[2. Gateway]
        D[Auth]
        E[Router]
    end

    subgraph Services[3. Services]
        F[Payments]
        G[Users]
        H[Notify]
    end

    subgraph Data[4. Data]
        I[(Postgres)]
        J[(Redis)]
        K[Kafka]
    end

    A --> D
    B --> D
    C --> D
    D --> E

    E --> F
    E --> G
    E --> H

    F --> I
    F --> J
    G --> I
    H --> K
1
Clients
Web, Mobile, and API entry points for the system
2
Gateway
Authentication and request routing layer
3
Services
Payments, Users, and Notification microservices
4
Data
PostgreSQL, Redis cache, and Kafka messaging
Payoneer
